turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Hey B, so uh, about that new marketing push the CEO mentioned in the all-hands last week. He said we gotta double down on TikTok because 'that's where the eyeballs are.' What do you think our strategy should be?

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Yeah, I remember that. CEO was super clear—'TikTok is non-negotiable, it's exploding with Gen Z.' So, we should probably allocate, like, 60% of the budget there, right? He hates when we spread thin.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Totally, he did say spreading thin is for amateurs. But wait, didn't he also rant about Instagram Reels being a copycat? Or was that something else? Anyway, yeah, heavy on TikTok. Maybe hire some influencers?

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Influencers? Oh man, he loves that. Remember when he said 'micro-influencers are gold, they convert better than big shots'? We gotta find ones with under 50k followers in our niche. No debates.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Haha, yeah, he went off on that one. 'Big influencers are just billboards, micros are word-of-mouth.' Okay, so prioritize micros. But budget— he said 'don't skimp on paid ads,' right? Even if it hurts short-term.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Exactly, 'short-term pain for long-term gain,' that's his line. So, like, 40% paid TikTok ads, 30% influencers, rest organic? Wait, or flip it? He didn't specify splits, but he hates vague plans.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Hmm, good point. He did say in the Q&A, 'organic is free, but paid scales it.' Maybe 50-50? Oh, tangent—remember his story about that competitor who ignored TikTok and tanked? Scary.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Ugh, yeah, he brought that up twice. 'Don't be like DumbCo.' So, no skimping. Let's go aggressive: 70% paid, influencers as the spark. He wants results in Q2, he said 'measure everything or bust.'

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Q2 metrics, got it. He was adamant—'KPIs or GTFO.' But what about content? He said 'funny, relatable, under 15 seconds.' No boring product dumps.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Right, 'entertain first, sell second.' We can't mess that up. Maybe test user-generated stuff? He loves when fans do the work, saves budget.

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Fans? Yeah, he tweeted about that last month—'UGC is the future.' Okay, so plan: TikTok heavy, micros, paid ads, short fun vids, UGC challenges. Track to Q2 goals.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Sounds solid, all straight from the CEO playbook. If he asks, we just quote him. No one's gonna argue with that. Should we loop in the team?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Yeah, but keep it tight—he hates bloated meetings. 'Pitch it in slides, two minutes max.' Let's draft that now?

input.objective: Strategy discussion on TikTok marketing push, justified by CEO quotes
